nodes.label: Landing
nodes.note: Role picker: writer path vs. exec path. Pricing link.

nodes.label: Welcome / Sign Up
nodes.note: Create Account and Sign In tabs. Live password strength meter (4 requirements). Button stays grey until valid. Age 18+ confirmation + content policy summary.

nodes.label: Pricing
nodes.note: Plan comparison, ghost CTA back into the free upload flow.

nodes.label: Exec Sign Up
nodes.note: Manual credential verification: IMDbPro + company email + LinkedIn.

nodes.label: Onboarding
nodes.note: 6-step walkthrough: Save the Cat grading, plain-English feedback, Creative Choice, Fix It editor, Logline/Story DNA pitch tools, processing-time honesty.

nodes.label: Exec Onboarding
nodes.note: First-time verified-reader walkthrough; skipped on repeat logins.

nodes.label: Upload
nodes.note: Drag & drop. Title confirmation modal. Co-writer fields (up to 3). TOS fires before analysis, not after. Sample script for demos.

nodes.label: Processing
nodes.note: Countdown or clapperboard loader while the real API call runs in parallel.

nodes.label: Coverage Report
nodes.note: Stat row, pacing heatmap, editable logline/Story DNA, 5 craft dimension cards with Fix It + Creative Choice, Revision Plan, My Listing + Exec Mode toggles.

nodes.label: Writer Profile
nodes.note: Avatar, member stats, script cards with status chips, activity feed, pending request approvals.

nodes.label: Review Requests
nodes.note: Writer-side approve/decline queue for reader access requests.

nodes.label: Exec Profile
nodes.note: Sidebar nav with notification badges. Donut ring charts. Requested scripts list. Activity feed.

nodes.label: Discovery Dashboard
nodes.note: Filter sidebar (score, genre, Story DNA comps, format). Script cards with mini score bars. Request Access triggers reader TOS.
